---
title: "Fertility Drivers"
subtitle: "An Interactive Analysis of Global Birth Rates"
categories: ["Shiny"]
date: "2026-03-02"
image: "../images/fertilitydrivers.png"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<div class="shiny-iframe-container" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 20px; overflow: auto;">
  <object data="https://3vw3oh-veronica-pletsch.shinyapps.io/shinyapp/" type="text/html" width="100%" height="1600px" style="border: none; width: 100%; min-width: 100%; overflow: auto;">
    This browser does not support embedding external pages. Please visit the app directly: <a href="https://3vw3oh-veronica-pletsch.shinyapps.io/shinyapp/">https://3vw3oh-veronica-pletsch.shinyapps.io/shinyapp/</a>
  </object>
</div>
